description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Benea Rigatoni pasta, featuring a natural, earthy color palette with a large green circular logo on the front. The front panel displays a cut-out window in the shape of the letter 'R', revealing the rigatoni pasta inside, and is adorned with product information and icons indicating natural ingredients and recyclability. The left side of the box provides detailed nutritional information and customer service contact details. The back panel includes a brand story, preparation instructions, and a recipe suggestion with a photo of a prepared pasta dish. The right side showcases images of other Benea pasta varieties, encouraging consumers to try different options. The overall design is clean, modern, and emphasizes the product's gourmet and natural qualities.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of Benea Rigatoni pasta with a green logo, a pasta-shaped window, and detailed product information on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Benea logo, a large 'R' window revealing rigatoni pasta, and key product icons.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the nutritional information panel and customer service details.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the brand story, preparation instructions, a recipe, and a photo of a pasta dish.
description_view_3: Right side view with images of other Benea pasta varieties and a promotional message.
attribute_brand_logo: A green circular logo with the word 'Benea' in white, located prominently on the front and back panels.
attribute_flavor_indication: The word 'Rigatoni' and a window showing rigatoni pasta indicate the pasta type; no specific flavor indicated.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information panel is visible on the left side, listing calories, macronutrients, and serving size.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Images of other Benea pasta varieties on the right side panel, encouraging consumers to try other products.
